title.description: Page heading for the My Free Mints page (the user's free-claim rewards).

historyHeading.description: Section heading above the table of past/inactive free mints (claim history).

table.item.description: Column header for the free-mint item (the domain or campaign offer).

table.issuedOn.description: Column header for the date the free mint was issued.

table.validUntil.description: Column header for the free mint's expiration date.

table.status.description: Column header for the free mint's status (claimed / in progress / expired / available).

table.claimedDomain.description: Column header for the domain that was claimed with the free mint.

table.claimedOn.description: Column header for the date the free mint was claimed.

campaignItem.description: Rich-text item label for a campaign free mint, e.g. 'Any example.com subdomain'. The <domain>…</domain> tag wraps {domain}, a parent domain name rendered as a styled chip — keep {domain} and the tags; do not translate the domain name.

campaignLabel.description: Plain-text campaign label shown on the free-mint card, e.g. 'Any example.com subdomain'. {domain} is a parent domain name — keep untranslated.

statusBadge.claimed.description: Status badge: the free mint has been claimed.

statusBadge.inProgress.description: Status badge: the free mint is currently being claimed.

statusBadge.expired.description: Status badge: the free mint has expired.

statusBadge.available.description: Status badge: the free mint is available to claim.

noHistory.description: Empty-state line shown in the history section when there are no past claims yet.

emptyTitle.description: Empty-state title shown when the user has no free mints at all.

emptyDescription.description: Empty-state body explaining that free-claim opportunities will appear here when received.

card.issued.description: Small label on the free-mint card marking the issue date (date shown as MM/yy).

card.validThru.description: Small label on the free-mint card marking the expiry date (date shown as MM/yy).

card.claimNow.description: Primary action button on the free-mint card that starts claiming.

card.poweredByNamefi.description: Accessibility label for the brand logo on the free-mint card. Keep 'Namefi' as the brand name.

dropdown.title.description: Header label at the top of the free-mints dropdown menu in the site header.

dropdown.claim.description: Button in a free-mints dropdown row that starts claiming that free mint.

dropdown.viewAll.description: Footer link in the free-mints dropdown that navigates to the full My Free Mints page.
